subject: feat(ui): map-behind-list layout with bottom sheet and collapsible filters
body:
Redesign home screen from toggle-based map/list to a Google Maps style
layout: full-screen map always visible with a draggable bottom sheet
containing search, filters, and station list.

Changes:
- New BottomSheet component using PanResponder + Animated (no extra deps)
  Three snap points: peek (handle + header), half (50%), full (90%)
  Flick gesture detection for natural swipe-to-expand/collapse
- Home screen: map fills entire background, sheet overlays on top
  Removed map/list toggle — both are always visible simultaneously
- Filters auto-hide on scroll down, reappear on scroll up
  Uses Animated height + opacity for smooth collapse transition
- Default sort changed from nearest to cheapest — users primarily want
  the best price, distance is secondary
- StationList accepts onScroll prop for parent scroll tracking
- Map container: removed borderRadius and margins for full-screen display

Tags: ui, layout, ux, mobile
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: neutral
Epic: ux-improvements
Semver: minor
